---
title: The short-term comprehensive impact of the phase-out of global coal combustion
  on air pollution and climate change
pagetitle: 2025-2-1-Ge2025a - Gang Chen
body-classes: publication-page
format:
  html:
    title-block-style: none
year: 2025
author: Wendong Ge, Noah S Prime, Steven J Smith, Junfeng Liu, Yang Ren, Yuhan Zhou,
  Huihuang Wu, Xian Wang and Gang Chen
venue: Environmental Pollution
venue_cit: <i>Environmental Pollution</i>, 367, 125669, doi:10.1016/j.envpol.2025.125669.
recommended_citation: 'Wendong Ge, Noah S Prime, Steven J Smith, Junfeng Liu, Yang
  Ren, Yuhan Zhou, Huihuang Wu, Xian Wang and Gang Chen, 2025: The short-term comprehensive
  impact of the phase-out of global coal combustion on air pollution and climate change,
  <i>Environmental Pollution</i>, 367, 125669, doi:10.1016/j.envpol.2025.125669.'
paper_url: https://linkinghub.elsevier.com/retrieve/pii/S0269749125000429
---

::: {.page-with-sidebar}

::: {.sidebar-col}
{{< include /_author-profile.qmd >}}
:::

::: {.content-col}

# The short-term comprehensive impact of the phase-out of global coal combustion on air pollution and climate change

*Published in Environmental Pollution, 2025*

**Recommended citation:** Wendong Ge, Noah S Prime, Steven J Smith, Junfeng Liu, Yang Ren, Yuhan Zhou, Huihuang Wu, Xian Wang and Gang Chen, 2025: The short-term comprehensive impact of the phase-out of global coal combustion on air pollution and climate change, <i>Environmental Pollution</i>, 367, 125669, doi:10.1016/j.envpol.2025.125669.

[Download paper](https://linkinghub.elsevier.com/retrieve/pii/S0269749125000429){target="_blank"}

:::

:::
